prediction.reasoning: The price prediction for PLD in 3 days is based on a Monte Carlo simulation using a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. The current price of $139.62 serves as the starting point. Daily drift (mu) and volatility (sigma) parameters were estimated using typical historical stock market values (annualized drift of ~9% and annualized volatility of ~20%, converted to daily equivalents: mu_daily ≈ 0.00033, sigma_daily ≈ 0.0126). 10,000 price paths were simulated over 3 trading days. The point estimate is the median of these 10,000 simulated prices, and the confidence intervals are calculated from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated price distribution (e.g., 25th-75th percentiles for 50% CI, 10th-90th for 80% CI, and 5th-95th for 90% CI).
